name: Ham Hideaways
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay the ham on waxed paper to form a 7x8-inch rectangle.
2. Spread the chive-and-onion flavored cream cheese evenly over the ham.
3. Place a row of small, sweet pickled gherkins along one short side of the ham.
4. Roll the ham tightly around the pickles.
5. Cover the roll with plastic wrap.
6. Refrigerate for 30 minutes or overnight.
7. Slice diagonally into 1-inch pieces.
8. Each roll makes 8 pieces.
